# internal-artifact-mapping.txt
# Mapping of internal/vendor JARs for CI installation via install-internal-deps.sh
#
# Format (pipe-separated, 6 fields):
#   relative-path|groupId|artifactId|version|packaging|classifier
#
# - relative-path : path to the JAR relative to the repository root
# - groupId       : Maven groupId
# - artifactId    : Maven artifactId
# - version       : Maven version
# - packaging     : artifact type (usually "jar")
# - classifier    : optional Maven classifier (leave empty if not needed)
#
# Lines starting with '#' are comments and are ignored by the install script.
#
# How it works:
#   - For each active (uncommented) entry the script tries to install the
#     specified JAR into the local Maven repository.
#   - If the JAR file is missing the script creates a TEMPORARY dummy JAR and
#     installs that instead, so that the Maven build can continue in CI.
#   - Dummy JARs MUST be replaced with real artifacts before production use.
#   - See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidance on replacing dummy JARs.

# --- Artifacts present in libs/ ---
libs/common-lib-0.0.3.jar|com.projectgoth|common-lib|0.0.3|jar|
libs/hashtag-0.0.2.jar|com.projectgoth|hashtag|0.0.2|jar|
libs/s3uploader-0.0.1.jar|com.projectgoth|s3uploader|0.0.1|jar|
libs/leto-common-0.27.0.jar|com.projectgoth|leto-common|0.27.0|jar|
libs/je-3.3.74.jar|berkeley|je|3.3.74|jar|
libs/Ice.jar|com.zeroc|Ice|3.3.1|jar|
libs/swt-linux-3.3.1.1.jar|swt|swt-linux|3.3.1.1|jar|
libs/amqp-client-2.6.1.jar|com.rabbitmq|amqp-client|2.6.1|jar|
libs/Fusion.jar|com.projectgoth|Fusion|8.75.132|jar|

# --- Add mappings for artifacts that previously failed to resolve (CI will install real jars if present in libs/ or create dummy jars) ---
# When the real JAR is obtained, add it to libs/ and re-run the install script.
# Dummy JARs are temporary placeholders and must be replaced with real artifacts as soon as they are available.
libs/scannotation-1.0.2.jar|org.scannotation|scannotation|1.0.2|jar|
libs/configuration-1.0.5.jar|com.projectgoth|configuration|1.0.5|jar|
libs/jpcap-0.7.jar|jpcap|jpcap|0.7|jar|
libs/commons-net-ftp-2.0.jar|commons-net-ftp|commons-net-ftp|2.0|jar|
libs/jbossall-client-4.0.1.jar|org.jboss|jbossall-client|4.0.1|jar|
libs/jsch-0.1.33.jar|com.jcraft|jsch|0.1.33|jar|
libs/json-1.0.jar|org.json|json|1.0|jar|
libs/keyczar-0.6b-1.5-111908.jar|org.keyczar|keyczar|0.6b-1.5-111908|jar|
libs/java_memcached-release-2.0.1.jar|com.danga|java_memcached-release|2.0.1|jar|
libs/mibli-1.0.jar|mibli|mibli|1.0|jar|
libs/mysql-connector-java-5.1.7-bin.jar|mysql|mysql-connector-java|5.1.7|jar|bin

# --- Missing artifacts (real JARs not yet available in this repository) ---
# When the real JAR is obtained, add it to libs/, uncomment the line below,
# and remove the corresponding dummy from any CI cache.
#
# libs/mig33rabbitmq-client-0.5.0.jar|com.mig33|mig33rabbitmq-client|0.5.0|jar|
